spec_match.rationale: The page now names X25519Kyber768Draft00, TLS NamedGroup 0x6399, the 1216-byte client share, 1120-byte server share, and 64-byte combined secret from the IETF draft.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP exercised the harvest sliders, handshake detail buttons, and deployment edge-case buttons; each control updated a live readout.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page still covers the parent blurb's harvest-now-decrypt-later promise while adding the exact hybrid construction and deployment compatibility context.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now covers classical fallback, ClientHello-size or codepoint blocking before page JavaScript runs, and invalid calculator timelines.

references.rationale: The concept page now links to chromestatus.com/feature/5257822742249472 plus the IETF draft and feature conformance probe.

design_system.rationale: The added controls use shared CSS variables, and every local button background override also sets color.

summary: Repaired concept: pre-fix Chrome DevTools MCP showed no ChromeStatus link, no NamedGroup/share-size surface, no failure-mode control, and a negative harvest window when the sliders were set to 2032/2028. Post-fix Chrome DevTools MCP validated the harvest sliders, client/server/secret/NamedGroup buttons, classical fallback, ClientHello-size failure, invalid timeline rejection, ChromeStatus/IETF references, clean console output, successful network requests, and the feature conformance route.
